[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010110 3
1 1111100 5
2 0011010 3
3 1111001 5
4 0110011 4
5 0001100 2
6 1101111 6
7 0000010 1

70 07 1001101 4
